headline: Absurdity first, then thought, then writing
lead: From 2017 to 2026, this archive holds 85 Chinese posts at its core. The blog reads like a private garden: it can still be rewarding even when no one stops by.
intro_block: The early posts lean toward Arts & screen. The middle years drift toward Tools & tech. The later work settles around Economics & method, so the archive can be read as a sequence of changing interests.
The most common writing mode is Analysis, with Guides forming the second line. That split is more useful than a tone label: it says how the posts work on the page.
quote: Once you step into this strange garden of thought, the world is no longer quite the same. - Samuelson
paragraphs: The early posts lean toward Arts & screen. The middle years drift toward Tools & tech. The later work settles around Economics & method, so the archive can be read as a sequence of changing interests.
The most common writing mode is Analysis, with Guides forming the second line. That split is more useful than a tone label: it says how the posts work on the page.

vignette_cards.title: Peak year
vignette_cards.text_html: 42 posts landed in that year. Momentum mattered.

vignette_cards.title: Recurring words
vignette_cards.text_html: Repeated words point to the questions the archive keeps circling back to.

vignette_cards.title: Scale range
vignette_cards.text_html: The broadest piece is "Writing Advice". The most sentence-rich one is "Writing Advice".
